summary: Backend testing for Username Management System (Iteration 251). All 39 tests passed. Tested username availability checking, setting, changing with 60-day cooldown, status retrieval, and @mention search autocomplete.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper validation, error handling, and async database operations
60-day cooldown is correctly enforced before same-username check (returns 429 if in cooldown)
Reserved usernames list is comprehensive and properly checked
Search endpoint correctly prioritizes prefix matches over contains matches for @mention autocomplete
context_for_next_testing_agent: All username management endpoints are working correctly. The test user is currently in 60-day cooldown period for username changes.

TestUsernameCheck.test_check_valid_available_username: PASSED - Returns availability status for unique usernames
TestUsernameCheck.test_check_username_starts_with_number: PASSED - Rejects usernames starting with number
TestUsernameCheck.test_check_username_with_special_chars: PASSED - Rejects usernames with special chars (except underscore)
TestUsernameCheck.test_check_reserved_usernames: PASSED - Rejects admin, support, test, user, system
TestUsernameCheck.test_check_username_with_user_id: PASSED - Supports user_id param for self-check

TestUsernameStatus.test_status_valid_user: PASSED - Returns username, can_change, days_until_change, cooldown_days=60

TestUsernameSearch.test_search_response_structure: PASSED - Users have id, user_id, username, full_name, avatar_url, role, is_verified
TestUsernameSearch.test_search_max_limit: PASSED - Enforces max limit of 20 via validation

TestIntegrationFlow.test_validation_consistency: PASSED - Validation consistent between check and set endpoints

verified_features: GET /api/username/check/{username} - Returns availability status with validation (3-30 chars, starts with letter, alphanumeric + underscore)
POST /api/username/set - Sets username for first-time users, validates format and reserved names
PUT /api/username/change - Enforces 60-day cooldown, tracks history, prevents reclaiming if taken by others
GET /api/username/status - Returns username, can_change, days_until_change, cooldown_days (60)
GET /api/username/search?q={query} - Returns users for @mention autocomplete, prioritizes prefix matches, max limit 20
Reserved usernames (admin, support, test, user, system, etc.) are correctly blocked

username_validation_rules_verified.pattern: Must start with letter, alphanumeric + underscore only
